content:
Tu khub mane full

Tara mast gulabi full

Mitho toh saad daiyne te toh mara

Mando Lago Re

Veer na thaine varas
Madshe ogho
Saiyam na bhaav ni karone pariksha
Jena pavan pagla thi
Sansar no raag todi

Nem nem nem vala nem

Mara rome tu girnar
Rome rome girnar

Brahma charnara (Namami nemi ) only this line

Sarva svikar ni( aa nemi toh)
One more kaddi , tu bhav ananta
paisa padhad line

Mara rushab no che marg
Virti rag

Gunje saiyam na jaykara ( only one line)
Keva shobhe mara jinraya

Oo vidhi sundar nadini( ee dhima pagle) 1 para

Akhiyan har khan
Akal aroopi aur avinashi - this para

Lagi lagi re taari- 1 line

Vala antriskh dada bolo be

Hriday mandir
Andhra dhar varse che

Mehlo thi pan vadhu

No ….. Ankhon mai poor
Antar na antriksh

Have parwade nahi rehvanu
Have sharnu lidhu che toh
Have jodu nahi

Virthi dhar no vesh only line
Siddhgiri ne bhethwano

Siddha chal darbar jajrman
Koi je na aape ee toh sgdu
Mara rushabhji toh maru
Phoola na jhula ma koi mehman lage

Nem rajul panthe - obe line

Hu baad tamari chu ( one line tame rakhjo maathe haath)

Nem shaliya
Madhuban ma jya

Attam ne parmatam
Maru hruday
Tara anjan

Girnare shri prabhu nem
Tu girnare biraje che

Nemras

Taro sathvaro
Tara roop upar hu ( all kaddi)
Tara milan ni

Tara j panthe

Itni shakti

Rajja aapo have

jag magta ( ame hamara prabhu ne ji)
sagdu tane sopi(okayokay) taarje dubadje
mann mhi dhidhu
(tu dosh santap taade)
onncha ambar (obnly this line)”
Aadeshwar jinraaj ne bhave karu Vandana ( good for chorus)
Hu mangu param no path
parshwa chintamani(start with prit bani hai )
rushabh jinand ( hu anath tu start)
gelu lagyu mujhe ( lagni laagi re)
raj path janara ( slow but )
jaag jaaye chetna toh jya bhala kuhc hota hai ( lehra do )
saaadhna na panthe ( mara java loko aaj)
saiyam kyare madse ( sLOW)
kyare banish hu sacho re sanr
Vando re vando
Girnar na aadinath mara haiye waso ne naath
Pawan ni paani holds out oo ce
O veer taru shashan mujheee

Pawan ni pankho ma
Humein raston
Har swas ma
Parmatma

Rusabh jinnand dayal
Capo 2 C scale
C Am Em F G
Vimlachal mandan
Hu anath tu tribuhav

Siddhachal darbar normal G
Musafari - capo 2 D G A5
Parmtma capo 1 C

Prabhu tamara pagle
Fm - (Em capo 1)
Em - D Prabhu tamara
D - Em pa pa
Em em am em badak pakde x2
Em - em varsha rani
AmG Em - emm bharido humne
Em D D Em hume hamari hathelio
Dosh thi bharyo
Eb - capo 3 C
C Dm7 C C x2 dosh thi
F C F C - bhale tu koyal
Mara shramana ma gsharp
CApo 1 G
Keva shobhe mara - D
Capo 2
C - F G
You will figure it
Raat divas upkaro
Nem maari saamu juane
Am - Em - F - emAm
Am - em - f - EmAm ami drashti thi maari
G G Em Em x 2 nigod
Am Em F Em
Am - C x2
Am - Em - F - emAm
Am - em - f - EmAm ami drashti thi maari
Arji sunlo oo nem

Guitar bhakti
Stuti raag and chords Capo 3 or 4
C - em - C - (F^)C
C - em - C - (F^)C
Am - F - Em - C
C - Am - C - (F^)C

Rusabh jinnand dayal
Capo 2 C scale
C Am Em F G
Vimlachal mandan
Hu anath tu tribuhav

Siddhachal darbar normal G

Musafari - capo 2 D G A5

Parmtma capo 1 G possible

Prabhu tamara pagle
Fm - (Em capo 1)

Em - D Prabhu tamara
D - Em pa pa
Em em am em badak pakde x2
Em - em varsha rani
AmG Em - emm bharido humne
Em D D Em hume hamari hathelio
Dosh thi bharyo
Eb - capo 3 C
C Dm7 C C x2 dosh thi
F C F C - bhale tu koyal
Mara shramana ma gsharp
CApo 1 G
Keva shobhe mara - D
Capo 2
C - F G
You will figure it
Raat divas upkaro
Nem maari saamu juane capo 5
Am - Em - F - emAm
Am - em - f - EmAm ami drashti thi maari
G G Em Em x 2 nigod
Am Em F Em
Am - C x2
Am - Em - F - emAm
Am - em - f - EmAm ami drashti thi maari
Arji sunlo oo nem
Tujhne joya karu paap dhoya
Jinvar taru shashan

Tara hoth fad fade eni rah jau chu

Jeni kiki kaadi
